# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const cookies = req.cookies;
  const authCookie = cookies['auth'];
  
  // Here you would want to check the authCookie with your auth provider to validate the session
  // The actual implementation will depend on your auth provider but the general idea would be:
  // const authValid = validateAuthWithYourProvider(authCookie);

  // For this dummy example, we'll just check if the authCookie exists
  const authValid = Boolean(authCookie);

  if (!authValid) {
    return NextResponse.redirect('/login');
  }

  return NextResponse.next();
}
